title: Panicum obscurans
taxonomy: Panicum obscurans is classified under the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This classification places it within the order Poales, which consists of flowering plants that have parallel-veined leaves. Further, Panicum obscurans is classified under the genus Panicum, a group of grasses that are typically found in warm and temperate regions. Within the genus Panicum, Panicum obscurans belongs to the species level. The exact classification of Panicum obscurans may be subject to ongoing research and updates in botanical classification systems.

The health benefits of some Panicum species include their potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
